title: Full Dive: This Ultimate Next-Gen Full Dive RPG Is Even Shittier than Real Life!
sourceNotes: Single-cour, 12-episode anime adapting the first light novel volume. The manga tie-in (Kino, Monthly Comic Alive) was cancelled after 11 chapters in Jan. 2022, covering only roughly the first half of the anime's run (through about episode 6); AniList does not track a chapter count for it since it stopped without a defined ending. Episodes 7-12 have no manga equivalent as a result. Original light novel; manga is a close but incomplete tie-in adaptation.
